allGroups.description: If true, lists Resources across all Groups (groupId is ignored). If false or unspecified, lists within the Group specified by groupId, or the default Group if groupId is unspecified.

groupId.description: Group identifier. Uses the default Group if not specified. Ignored if allGroups is true.

groupType.description: Group type. Lists Resources across all Group types if not specified.

resourceType.description: Resource type. Lists Resources across all Resource types if not specified.
